title: Tart and Crunchy Chicken
description: A delicious and crispy chicken dish from Argentina, with a tangy twist.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken with garlicky seasoning blend.
3. Dip the chicken in the flour, then the eggs, and finally the tart panko breadcrumbs.
4. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the coated chicken breasts to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
6. Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
7. Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before serving.
